settings_profile_desc: Manage how your account appears across the panel.
settings_display_name_desc: Set the name shown across the panel without changing your login username.
settings_display_name_hint: Your login username stays @{{username}}. Leave it empty to fall back to the username.
settings_username_readonly_hint: Username is used for sign-in and cannot be changed.
settings_account_readonly_desc: These fields are used for sign-in and notifications, and can only be changed through system flows for now.
